empty.heading: No alert rules
empty.body: Add an alert to be notified when a new signal appears on a dossier you track.

form.severityHelper: Only alert for signals at these severities. Leave unselected to alert on all signals.

channelDesc.smtp: Delivered to your account email via on-prem SMTP.
channelDesc.webhook: POST to configured endpoint. Deep-link only.

error.load: Couldn't load alert rules. Check your connection and retry.
error.save: Couldn't save alert rule. Try again.

delete.heading: Delete this alert rule?
delete.body: You'll no longer be notified of matching signals on this dossier.
